TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Dipit ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Toyohama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 41 buwan, 77 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 76 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 1 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 94%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Dipit hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Dipit hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Dipit hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Dipit hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Dipit hya' ga Culiu. tay mkyahu' na Dipit hya' ga Paterungan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Dipit ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Dipit ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *ipit ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu tojoħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *ipit ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na *ipit ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na *ipit ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *ipit ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *ipit ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨuliu. taj mkjaħuʔ na *ipit ħjaʔ ɣa pateruŋan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ *ipit ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ *ipit ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Dipit ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Toyohama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 41 buwan, 77 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 76 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 1 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 94%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Dipit hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Dipit hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Dipit hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Dipit hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Dipit hya' ga Culiu. tay mkyahu' na Dipit hya' ga Paterungan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Dipit ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Dipit ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *ipit ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu tojoħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *ipit ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na *ipit ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na *ipit ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *ipit ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *ipit ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨuliu. taj mkjaħuʔ na *ipit ħjaʔ ɣa pateruŋan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ *ipit ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ *ipit ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
